name: Jan's German Red Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the bacon into 1-inch pieces and fry slowly in a large pot while you prepare the other ingredients.
2. Peel the onion and pierce the cloves (15-30) with a small knife.
3. Add the onion to the pot and warm it with the bacon.
4. Chop the cabbage into roughly bite-sized chunks, slightly thicker than slaw slices.
5. Add enough water to cover about half of the cabbage; then increase heat to high.
6. Quarter, core, and peel the apples. Toss them in with a handful (about 1/2 teaspoon) of salt and sprinkle lemon juice over everything.
7. When the water reaches a boil, reduce heat and cover the pot.
8. Cook for 10 minutes, then stir and smell.
9. Cover and cook another 10 minutes.
10. Serve as is or ladle out some liquid, thicken with cornstarch or arrowroot, and stir back in.
